title: Doreenian ambergris
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Doreenian ambergris''' was a natural substance vomited up by the [[Cetacean/Legends|cetaceans]] of the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] world [[Doreen]]. It could often be found floating on the the planet's gentle waves or washed ashore on the perimeters of its scattered islands. Doreenian ambergris was a traditional [[Perfume/Legends|perfume]] ingredient in the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region, and traditional perfumers from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] would pay a high price for it.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

The lucrative trade in ambergris meant that the planet was plagued by gangs of [[Scavenger/Legends|scavengers]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] operating on the oceans in [[Skimmer/Legends|skimmers]], hunted by the security forces of the ruling [[House Petro]].<ref name="TEA" /> Around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] used Doreenian ambergris as a cover cargo while he [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggled]] [[Spice/Legends|spice]] for [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesian]] priests.<ref name="TPS">''[[The Paradise Snare]]''</ref>
